currentClaim: Threadsmith v0.2.0 Role-specific Packets v1 is accepted locally: each role receives a focused packet derived from the main Context Packet, with fs persistence under role-packets.

doneWhenChecklist.label: RoleContextPacket schema 已定义并从 domain 导出
runtime 可以从主 Context Packet 派生六类 role packet
planner / executor / reviewer / verifier / closeout / hygiene 各自聚焦不同 payload

knownGaps: This slice does not change Threadsmith.skill behavior yet.
This slice does not render role packets in the Control Deck UI.
Role packet payloads should stay deterministic and derived from the main Context Packet.
